title: Hardcore Vanilla++
description: Hardcore lite-vanilla friendly modpack for multiplayer servers
body:
![Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba9ab383bbfaebf7a7a9a1a1061cd95e3db6ae54.png)

# 🌍 Lite-Vanilla Friendly Hardcore Modpack (Minecraft 1.21.6)

_A lightweight hardcore survival modpack designed to stay close to vanilla while adding small quality-of-life improvements and world enhancements. Perfect for multiplayer, with a clean and immersive gameplay loop._

### 🔧 Main Features:

- Hardcore gameplay with respawn tweaks
  - Instead of death, player enters K.O. state for set time. In this state other players may come and rescue dying player
- Improved UI and inventory management
- Light world generation and atmosphere improvements
- Great for small multiplayer servers or LAN survival
- Vein miner through enchant

### 🧱 Included Highlights (selected mods):

- Litematica – advanced building schematics (note: may be restricted on some servers)
- Terralith – new biome generation (if used in datapacks)
- Structory – new vanilla-style structures
- BetterF3 – detailed debug screen overhaul
- Inventory Profiles Next – fast sorting and inventory control
- Sound Physics Remastered – immersive environmental sounds
- Resourceful Backpacks – basic backpack system
- Do a Barrel Roll, Silk All, Unlock All Recipes, Crafting Tweaks – quality-of-life tweaks
- Entity Culling, Sodium, Lithium, Iris Shaders – performance and visual improvements
- Hardcore Revive, Hardcore Totem – hardcore death/respawn mechanics
- Essential Mod – multiplayer invites and LAN enhancements

_⚠️ Note:
This modpack includes Litematica, which provides schematic-based building assistance. Make sure it's allowed on the server you're playing on._
